languages.text: "Нас не убил целый мир, не убьют и эти твари!"
"This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"
languages.original_text: "Нас не убил целый мир, не убьют и эти твари!"

traits.locale_text: "An entire world failed to kill us, so these foul things stand no chance!"
"An entire world failed to kill us, so these foul things stand no chance!"
"This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"
"This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"

languages.text: “这整颗行星都弄不死我们，这些肮脏玩意儿又算得了什么？”
languages.original_text: "This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"

traits.locale_text: “这整颗行星都弄不死我们，这些肮脏玩意儿又算得了什么？”

languages.text: "Şu koca dünya bizi öldüremediyse bu iğrenç şeylerin ne şansı olabilir ki?"
languages.original_text: "This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"

traits.locale_text: "Şu koca dünya bizi öldüremediyse bu iğrenç şeylerin ne şansı olabilir ki?"

languages.text: « Si ce monde entier est incapable de nous tuer, quelles chances pourraient bien avoir ces infâmes créatures ? »
languages.original_text: "This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"

traits.locale_text: « Si ce monde entier est incapable de nous tuer, quelles chances pourraient bien avoir ces infâmes créatures ? »

languages.text: «Este mundo no pudo matarnos. ¿Qué posibilidades tienen esas cosas horrendas?».
languages.original_text: "This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"

traits.locale_text: «Este mundo no pudo matarnos. ¿Qué posibilidades tienen esas cosas horrendas?».

languages.text: "Diese ganze Welt konnte uns nicht töten, welche Chance sollten also diese Unholde haben?"
languages.original_text: "This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"

traits.locale_text: "Diese ganze Welt konnte uns nicht töten, welche Chance sollten also diese Unholde haben?"

languages.text: 「この世界全体が我々を殺せなかったんだ、こんな汚らわしいものどもに、何の見込みがある？」
languages.original_text: "This whole world couldn't kill us, so what chance do these foul things have?"

traits.locale_text: 「この世界全体が我々を殺せなかったんだ、こんな汚らわしいものどもに、何の見込みがある？」
